mapper.sql: notification_id, receiver_id, actor_id, category, notification_type, target_type, target_id, source_type, source_id, aggregate, aggregate_key, aggregate_unread_key, actor_count, title, content, snapshot_json, jump_json, read_status, visible_status, last_event_at, read_at, expire_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bluenote_notification.notification_record ( notification_id, receiver_id, actor_id, category, notification_type, target_type, target_id, source_type, source_id, aggregate, aggregate_key, aggregate_unread_key, actor_count, title, content, snapshot_json, jump_json, read_status, visible_status, last_event_at, read_at, expire_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{notificationId}, #{receiverId}, #{actorId}, #{category}, #{notificationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{aggregate}, #{aggregateKey}, #{aggregateUnreadKey}, #{actorCount}, #{title}, #{content}, #{snapshotJson}, #{jumpJson}, #{readStatus}, #{visibleStatus}, #{lastEventAt}, #{readAt}, #{expireAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_notification.notification_record WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND aggregate_unread_key = #{aggregateUnreadKey} AND read_status = 0 AND visible_status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_notification.notification_record SET actor_id = #{actorId}, actor_count = #{actorCount}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, snapshot_json = #{snapshotJson}, jump_json = #{jumpJson}, last_event_at = #{lastEventAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_status = 0 AND visible_status = 1
